title: How Roses Came Red.
content:
Roses at first were white,
    Till they could not agree,
    Whether my Sappho's breast
    Or they more white should be.

    But, being vanquish'd quite,
    A blush their cheeks bespread;
    Since which, believe the rest,
    The roses first came red.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "How Roses Came Red."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
